s: In 2014, Shae Simmons suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 2.910, WHIP 1.200, SO 23, WAR 0.200.
In 2016, Shae Simmons suited up for ATL as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.350, WHIP 0.900, SO 3, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (ATL -> SEA).
In 2017, Shae Simmons suited up for SEA as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.040, WHIP 1.040, SO 8, WAR 0.000. Notable context: Joined SEA.
